---
title: "parser.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/parser.ts"
loc: 44
complexity: 7
logic_score: 6.65
style_score: 3.79
intel_score: 9.27
overall_score: 6.57
---

## Intent
Orchestrates Babel AST parsing for the static analysis engine.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://web-tree-sitter)
- [*](file://path)
- [registry](file://./pathRegistry.js)

### Exports
- `TreeSitter`
- `isInitialized`
- `parsers`
- `initParsers`
- `initParsers`
- `getParser`
- `getParser`
- `ext`
- `langPath`
- `languageName`
- `fullWasmPath`
- `lang`
- `parser`
- `parseCode`
- `parseCode`
- `getParser`
